formalism: Complex path amplitudes (Fraunhofer far-field). P(y) = |A_L + A_R|^2 for coherent; P(y) = |A_L|^2 + |A_R|^2 + 2*(1-gamma)*Re(A_L*conj(A_R)) for partial. Born-rule sampling (seeded multinomial).
honest_framing: This is a quantum-style interferometer benchmark using complex amplitudes and Born-rule sampling. It is NOT a full quantum computer and does NOT simulate the physical universe. Its purpose is to validate observer-sensitive auditing logic in the Reality Audit framework.
